slides.title: Welcome
slides.bodyText:
AirBed&Breakfast
Book rooms with locals, rather than hotels.
19 rausch street, ste c, san francisco, ca 94103  www.airbedandbreakfast.com  (888) 461 8180  joe@airbedandbreakfast.com

slides.title: Problem
slides.bodyText:
Price is a important concern for customers booking travel online.
Hotels leave you disconnected from the city and its culture.
No easy way exists to book a room with a local or become a host.

slides.title: Solution
slides.bodyText:
A web platform where users can rent out their space to host travelers to:
SAVE MONEY - when traveling
MAKE MONEY - when hosting
SHARE CULTURE - local connection to the city

slides.title: Market Validation
slides.bodyText:
Couchsurfing.com - 660,000 total users
Craigslist.com - 50,000 temporary housing listings per week in the US. 07/09 - 07/16
(1) www.couchsurfing.com
(2) www.craigslist.org

slides.title: Market Size
slides.bodyText:
2 Billion+ TRIPS BOOKED (WORLDWIDE) - Total Available Market
source: Travel Industry Association of America & World Tourism Organization
560M BUDGET&ONLINE - Serviceable Available Market
source: comScore
84M TRIPS W/AB&B - Share of Market - 15% of Available Market

slides.title: Product
slides.bodyText:
SEARCH BY CITY -> REVIEW LISTINGS -> BOOK IT!
Stay with a local when traveling.
Where are you going?
Find a room

slides.title: Business Model
slides.bodyText:
We take a 10% commission on each transaction.
$84M TRIPS W/AB&B - Share of Market - 15% of Available Market
$25 AVG FEE - $80/night @ 3 nights
source: $70 is avg room price on AB&B
$2.1B REVENUE - Projected by 2011

slides.title: Adoption Strategy
slides.bodyText:
EVENTS - target events monthly: Octoberfest (6M), Cebit (700,000), Summerfest (1M), Eurocup (3M+), Mardi Gras (800,000) - with listing widget
PARTNERSHIPS - cheap / alternative travel: GoLoCo, KAYAK, Orbitz
CRAIGSLIST - dual posting feature

slides.title: Competition
slides.bodyText:
Competitive landscape matrix:
AFFORDABLE axis (top) to EXPENSIVE axis (bottom)
OFFLINE TRANSACTION (left) to ONLINE TRANSACTION (right)
Competitors: CouchSurfing, craigslist, BedandBreakfast.com, Hostels.com, rentahome, Orbitz, hotels.com, rentobi.com, VRBO
AirBed&Breakfast positioned: Affordable + Online Transaction

slides.title: Competitive Advantages
slides.bodyText:
1st TO MARKET - for transaction-based temporary housing site
HOST INCENTIVE - they can make money over couchsurfing.com
LIST ONCE - hosts post one time with us vs. daily on craigslist
EASE OF USE - search by price, location & check-in/check-out dates
PROFILES - browse host profiles, and book in 3 clicks
DESIGN & BRAND - memorable name will launch at historic DNC to gain share of mind

slides.title: Team
slides.bodyText:
Joe Gebbia, User Interface & PR - Entrepreneur and designer. Holds a patent for his product, CritBuns. A graduate of the Rhode Island School of Design (RISD), has dual BFA's in graphic design and industrial design.
Brian Chesky, Business Development & Brand - Founder of Brian Chesky, Inc, industrial design consultant. A graduate of the Rhode Island School of Design (RISD), has a BFA in industrial design.
Nathan Blecharcyzk, Developer - Created Facebook Apps "Your neighbors" (75,000 users) and "Rolodextrous", recently launched "Identified Hits." A graduate of computer science Harvard. Nate has worked at Microsoft, OPNET Technologies, and Batiq.
Michael Seibel, Advisor - Michael is the CEO and co-founder of www.justin.tv, a San Francisco based venture funded start up that delivers live video to the internet.

slides.title: Press
slides.bodyText:
"AirBed & Breakfast is a fun approach to couch surfing." - Webware (www.webware.com)
"Think of it as Craigslist meets Hotels.com, but a lot less creepy." - Josh Spear (www.joshspear.com)
"A cool alternative to a boring evening in a hotel room." - Mashable (www.mashable.com)
"AirBed's fee-based service could help alleviate concerns about quality of accommodations." - Springwise (www.springwise.com)

slides.title: User Testimonials
slides.bodyText:
"AirBed&Breakfast freaking rocks!" - Jason F., Washington, DC
"I found something in my price-range, and that's what really enabled me to come to the conference." - Jason R., Atlanta, GA
"A complete success. It is easy to use and it made me money." - Emily M., Austin, TX
"It's about the ideas, the interactions, the people. You don't get that in a hotel room." - Don A., Ontario, Canada

slides.title: Financial
slides.bodyText:
We are looking for 12 months financing to reach 80,000 transactions on AirBed&Breakfast.
$500K ANGEL ROUND - initial investment opportunity
80K TRIPS W/AB&B - avg $25 fee
$2M REVENUE - over 12 months
